mapper.insert:
insert into dms_medicine_item_record (drug_id, status, prescription_id, medicine_usage, frequency, days, num, medical_advice, refund_num, usage_num, usage_means, usage_num_unit, current_num) values
(#{it.drugId}, #{it.status}, #{it.prescriptionId}, #{it.medicineUsage}, #{it.frequency}, #{it.days}, #{it.num}, #{it.medicalAdvice}, #{it.refundNum}, #{it.usageNum}, #{it.usageMeans}, #{it.usageNumUnit}, #{it.currentNum})
mapper.select: select * from dms_medicine_item_record where prescription_id = #{prescriptionId} and (status is null or status <> 2) order by id asc
